title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI Model Cleared by US for Wider Use
description: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security.

title: AI Is Already Reshaping US Politics at Every Level
description: From data center backlash to boundless cash from tech billionaires and concerns about deepfaked campaign ads, AI is everywhere in the 2026 US elections.

title: S&P 500 Halts Four-Day Drop To End Jittery Week | The Close 6/26/2026
description: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group Chairman & CEO, Tom Rothman;  Former Pro Tennis Player, Caroline Wozniacki;   Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders and CEOs, Rashad Bilal & Troy Millings;  Forum AI Co-Founder & CEO, Campbell Brown;  RockCreek Founder & CEO, Afsaneh Beschloss;   Invesco Alterative ETF Strategy Head, Kathy Kriskey;  Franklin Templeton Head of Global Index Portfolio MGMT, Dina Ting;  and Morningstar Research Senior Equity Analyst, David Swartz (Source: Bloomberg)
